remainingGap: Prove no branch outside the current topology appears, and prove contained/isolated branches cannot become exact no-family equality.

branches.title: Pure Cube Branch
branches.claim: Pure cube exact danger reduces to a^3 + b^3 = c^3 and is blocked by Fermat exponent 3.

branches.title: Sixth-Power Bridge Branch
branches.claim: a^6 + b^3 = c^3 rewrites as (a^2)^3 + b^3 = c^3 and reduces to the cube wall.

branches.title: Fourth-Power Target Branch
branches.claim: Fourth-power target cases are factor-wall contained but not yet fully closed.

branches.title: Mixed-Power Branch
branches.claim: Mixed-power cases are isolated in current tests but not fully generalized.
